title: Cleopatra Jones and the Casino of Gold
original_title: Cleopatra Jones and the Casino of Gold
overview: When fellow operatives and friends disappear during a mission in Hong Kong, Cleopatra Jones comes to help. She discovers the disappearance involves The Dragon Lady, a feared lipstick lesbian who runs a casino and the local drug trade.
